title: Kavaratti, Lakshadweep — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kavaratti, Lakshadweep: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kavaratti is a city in Lakshadweep with a population of 12,000. The capital of Lakshadweep, a tropical island paradise with pristine beaches, coral reefs, and crystal-clear turquoise lagoons.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
